name: Banana Split Sundaes ( MW )
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate in a 2-cup measure.
2. Cook on 100% power for 1½ to 2 minutes or until melted, stirring once.
3. Stir in corn syrup and sweetened condensed milk.
4. Cook on 100% power for 30 to 45 seconds or until heated through.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Serve warm atop ice cream.
7. Sprinkle with peanuts.
8. Arrange quartered banana around the ice cream.
